title: rhipto #4496
definition:
1) to cast, throw
 2) throw down
 3) to cast forward or before
 4) to set down (with the suggestion of haste and want of care)
 5) to throw to the ground, prostrate
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to cast, throw
 2) throw down
 3) to cast forward or before
 4) to set down (with the suggestion of haste and want of care)
 5) to throw to the ground, prostrate

    NASB:  to throw, cast, spec. to throw off, toss:
